appDownload: Download Rental Gate app and book your car with ease

pickupDialog.loginPromptSuffix: first to choose from your saved addresses.

popularLocations.airportsCarOnlyNotice: These airports are available for booking with this car only and do not apply to other cars.
popularLocations.trainStationsCarOnlyNotice: These train stations are available for booking with this car only and do not apply to other cars.

tabs.airportUnavailable: This car cannot be picked up from or delivered to an airport.
tabs.trainStationUnavailable: This car cannot be picked up from or delivered to a train station.

airport.unavailable: Airport pickup/drop-off is not currently available for this car.
airport.suggestion: You can easily find cars that support airport pickup/drop-off by selecting a pickup location.

trainStation.unavailable: Train station pickup/drop-off is not currently available for this car.
trainStation.suggestion: You can easily find cars that support train station pickup/drop-off by selecting a pickup location.

branches.unavailable: Branch pickup is not currently available for this car.
branches.suggestion: Try picking up from your current location, or search for a car that supports branch pickup.

delivery.unavailable: Delivery service is not currently available for this car.
delivery.suggestion: You can easily find cars that support delivery by selecting a pickup location.

referral.title: Want to earn discounts?!!
referral.description: For every person you refer, you will get 50% discount on the rental period

bookings.title: My Bookings
bookings.description: View and manage all your bookings (Cars) in one place

searchForm.restrictedAirportLocation: Your current address is an airport. Please choose from the available airports.
searchForm.restrictedTrainStationLocation: Your current address is a train station. Please choose from the available train stations.

emptyState.noCarsAtLocation: No cars are available at this location.
emptyState.pickupPrompt: Select a pickup location to view available cars.

panner.title: Enjoy an unmatched premium car rental experience
panner.description: With the "Rental Gate" app, your car comes to your location with ease, now available on iPhone and Android.

flexibleRental.title: Flexible rental process
flexibleRental.description: We provide flexible rental terms that match your needs

successPartners.title: Our Partners in Success
